name: Ehsanul Haque Siam
title: AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer
tagline: Published researcher who ships production systems, from blockchain R&D and RAG pipelines to e-commerce platforms serving 50,000+ users
bio: I bridge research and production. Software Engineer at Ledgercross, building across the stack: backend services, React Native and Flutter apps, AI features, and the CI/CD and cloud infrastructure that ship them. Published peer-reviewed research (a Taylor & Francis book chapter and an accepted IEEE QPAIN 2026 paper). Previously drove 1.5x client revenue shipping 4 production websites at BetaScript LLC and built 15+ web scrapers with Gemini-powered AI pipelines at BDTracks. Obsessed with turning complex problems into systems that scale.
